name: Winamac Pickleball Courts
description: Winamac Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Winamac, IN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and lights. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Winamac Town Park
description: Winamac Town Park is a place to play pickleball in Winamac, IN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
